summary: coral-wraith postinstall script exfiltrates host information over HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and collects host identifiers via `os.hostname()` and `process.cwd()`, alongside imports of `child_process` and `http`. The script issues outbound GET requests carrying this information to an external endpoint, with no relation to any documented purpose for the package. This is the canonical install-time host-reconnaissance / exfiltration shape: an automatic lifecycle hook that gathers system metadata and beacons it off-host on every install. Any developer or CI system that runs `npm install coral-wraith` will leak hostname and working-directory information without consent.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
